script_text: Look! Fact books are full of real, true things.
They can be about anything. Bugs, planets, food, weather.
Let us learn how to enjoy fact books all year.
Pick fact books about things you love.
Love dinosaurs? Read about dinosaurs! Love space? Read about space!
When you love the topic, learning is fun.
Fact books have pictures, labels, and big words at the top.
Slow down and look at each one.
Pictures teach you facts the words might not say.
Pick a new topic each week. You will discover something cool!
Now you are ready to read fact books all year!
